lines.speaker: Иван
lines.target: Здравей! Аз съм Иван. Как се казваш?
lines.transliteration: Zdravey! Az sam Ivan. Kak se kazvash?
lines.english: Hello! I am Ivan. What is your name?

lines.speaker: Мария
lines.target: Здравей, Иване! Аз съм Мария. Много ми е приятно.
lines.transliteration: Zdravey, Ivane! Az sam Mariya. Mnogo mi e priyatno.
lines.english: Hello, Ivan! I am Maria. Very nice to meet you.

lines.speaker: Мария
lines.target: Аз съм от Пловдив. А ти?
lines.transliteration: Az sam ot Plovdiv. A ti?
lines.english: I am from Plovdiv. And you?

lines.speaker: Иван
lines.target: Аз съм от София. Живея там от десет години.
lines.transliteration: Az sam ot Sofiya. Zhiveya tam ot deset godini.
lines.english: I am from Sofia. I have lived there for ten years.

questions.question: How long has Ivan lived in Sofia?

lines.speaker: Сервитьор
lines.english: Good afternoon! What will you have?

lines.speaker: Клиент
lines.target: Едно кафе и парче торта, моля.
lines.transliteration: Edno kafe i parche torta, molya.
lines.english: One coffee and a piece of cake, please.

lines.speaker: Сервитьор
lines.target: Какво кафе искате? Черно или с мляко?
lines.transliteration: Kakvo kafe iskate? Cherno ili s mlyako?
lines.english: What kind of coffee do you want? Black or with milk?

lines.speaker: Клиент
lines.target: С мляко, моля. И без захар.
lines.transliteration: S mlyako, molya. I bez zakhar.
lines.english: With milk, please. And without sugar.

lines.speaker: Клиент
lines.english: No, thank you. Just the bill.

questions.question: How does the customer want the coffee?

lines.speaker: Турист
lines.target: Извинете, може ли да ми помогнете?
lines.transliteration: Izvinete, mozhe li da mi pomognete?
lines.english: Excuse me, can you help me?

lines.speaker: Местен
lines.target: Да, разбира се. Какво ви трябва?
lines.transliteration: Da, razbira se. Kakvo vi tryabva?
lines.english: Yes, of course. What do you need?

lines.speaker: Турист
lines.target: Търся Националния исторически музей. Далеко ли е?
lines.transliteration: Tarsya Natsionalniya istoricheski muzey. Daleko li e?
lines.english: I am looking for the National History Museum. Is it far?

lines.speaker: Местен
lines.target: Не, на около десет минути пеша. Вървете направо, после завийте наляво.
lines.transliteration: Ne, na okolo deset minuti pesha. Varvete napravo, posle zaviyte nalyavo.
lines.english: No, about ten minutes on foot. Go straight, then turn left.

questions.question: What is the tourist looking for?
How far away is the destination?
